message:
feat(extras, demo, ci): expand showcase, update extras, and fix CI toolchain

Demo showcase: add Tab/Shift+Tab/BackTab focus cycling in the advanced
text editor search panel. Expand visual_effects screen with new particle
system, plasma effect, metaball renderer, and matrix rain animations,
substantially increasing the demo's visual coverage.

Showcase HTML: expand the WASM showcase page with additional interactive
sections, improved styling, and better mobile responsiveness.

Extras: update charts, image, and syntax modules with minor API and
formatting adjustments to align with upstream widget API changes.

CI: switch all dtolnay/rust-toolchain action references from @master to
@stable for more predictable CI behavior, as @master tracks the action
repo's development branch rather than a release tag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           toolchain: ${{ matrix.rust }}
           components: rustfmt, clippy
@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
         with:
           toolchain: nightly
